case_title: ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC VS. KENNETH SIMON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMON, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS STREET #402 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78604481)

DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78604481) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, KENNETH

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, KENNETH
